title: Prisoner of Japan
writer: Edgar G. Ulmer, Robert Chapin, Arthur Ripley
actors: Alan Baxter, Gertrude Michael, Ernst Deutsch
plot: On a small tropical island in the South Pacific, David Bowman (Alan Baxter), a young American planter, finds himself pitted against a ruthless Japanese agent, Matsuru (Ernst Deutsch). He learns through Toni Chase (Gertrude Michael...
